task_objective: Industrial Visualization & 9-View 3x3 - Transform uploaded product image into 9 standard visualization maps, original structure FULLY PRESERVED

input_assets.source_image: User Uploaded Image - Product subject, composition, proportions, structural features, mechanical details - LOCKED

workflow.step_1: Auto-detect product structure from uploaded image: shape, contour, proportions, mechanical details, spatial relationships
workflow.step_2: Generate 9 visualization maps ALL from the original uploaded image independently: line art, depth, AO, white model, wireframe, normal, specular, silhouette, exploded — each derived directly from source, NOT sequentially from each other
workflow.step_3: Assemble 9-view 3x3 grid, clean white background between quadrants, professional engineering layout

outputs.view_1: Technical Line Art - Precise industrial line drawing, black lines on white bg, clear mechanical edges, engineering drawing style
outputs.view_2: Depth Map - Grayscale depth visualization, spatial relationships, near=bright far=dark, engineering precision
outputs.view_3: Ambient Occlusion Map - Soft shadows in crevices, contact areas, mechanical joints, corners and gaps only
outputs.view_4: White Clay Model - Ultra-precise matte white texture, professional studio lighting, Debossing, prominent AO, clean sharp edges
outputs.view_5: Wireframe - Geometric mesh/edge display, visible polygon structure, technical CAD wireframe style
outputs.view_6: Normal Map - RGB-encoded surface normals, blue=purple dominant, technical PBR reference
outputs.view_7: Specular Map - Grayscale reflectivity map, highlights=high reflectivity, dark=matte areas
outputs.view_8: Exploded View - Components separated along assembly axes, showing internal structure, technical illustration style,Chinese parts description; high-end visual and typographic elegance.
outputs.view_9: Silhouette - Pure black product shape on white bg, solid fill, no internal details, outline only

output_requirements: ALL 9 views MUST preserve identical product structure — same subject, composition, proportions, mechanical details from original image
Each view is independently derived from the ORIGINAL uploaded image — NOT sequentially from the previous view. Same product, different rendering mode only
Clean black background; no text/labels/watermarks; professional engineering grid layout
Physically accurate: depth map consistent with spatial relationships, AO in all crevices/joints, normal map correct surface orientation
Premium 3x3 - consistent framing across all views, industrial visualization presentation standard
